nodes.context: Organised criminal underbelly in Amsterdam and other major cities, formed by criminals of Dutch descent.

edges.evidence_quote: Often these local criminals groups are strongly connected with, or in some cases even have an official membership to, outlaw motorcycle gangs such as the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Local Dutch criminal groups are strongly connected with or have membership in Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: In the drugs business they closely cooperate with British firms and Colombian cartels for the importation and exportation of ecstasy and cocaine
edges.context: Penose cooperates with British firms in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The Amsterdam district Bijlmermeer for instance has been the scene of violence between two of its biggest gangs, the Hopi Boys and the Kloekhorststraat Gang.
edges.context: Hopi Boys and Kloekhorststraat Gang are in conflict over turf.

edges.evidence_quote: Curaçaoan and Surinamese crime groups based in the Netherlands have also formed alliances with said Colombian groups and have committed contract killings for them.
edges.context: Afro-Dutch crime groups (Curaçaoan and Surinamese) have alliances with Colombian cartels.
